source.name: Website reveal motion implementation parameters
source.license_notes: Original implementation guidance distilled from local Swishy motion pattern and Claude Code test gaps.

layout_rules: Reveal background atmosphere first, then hero glass panel, then toolbar/search/CTA, then section headers, then cards with stagger.
Keep the full reveal sequence around 900-1200ms so it feels premium but does not block use.
Set final states in CSS/DOM immediately and use animation only as enhancement.
For glass UI, animate container opacity/blur/translate; avoid animating backdrop-filter on many child elements at once.
accessibility_notes: Under prefers-reduced-motion, skip translate and blur; use opacity 0 to 1 over 120-180ms or no animation.
Do not delay keyboard access to controls while visual reveal is running.
Avoid repeated page reveal on every minor route or tab change.
implementation_hints: Background atmosphere: opacity 0 to 1, blur 18px to 0, duration 500-700ms, easing cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1).
Hero panel: opacity 0 to 1, translateY(34px) to 0, blur 12px to 0, duration 650-900ms, delay 80-120ms, easing cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1).
Toolbar/search/CTA: opacity 0 to 1, translateY(22px) to 0, blur 8px to 0, duration 520-720ms, delay 160-220ms.
Tabs/header: opacity 0 to 1, translateY(16px) to 0, duration 420-600ms, delay 220-300ms.
Cards: opacity 0 to 1, translateY(28px) to 0, scale(.975) to 1, blur 10px to 0, duration 560-760ms, stagger 80-140ms per card.
Notification/toast entry: translateX(24px) or translateY(18px) plus opacity, duration 360-520ms, easing cubic-bezier(.2,1.2,.2,1) for spring-like settle.
Fallback easing when spring is unavailable: cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) for smooth reveal; cubic-bezier(.2,1.25,.25,1) for soft overshoot.
Use will-change: transform, opacity, filter only during animation; remove or limit persistent will-change after settle.
avoid_when: large tables with many animated rows

quality.notes: Added after Claude Code reported website-reveal lacked implementation_hints detail.

retrieval.ai_summary: Website reveal implementation parameters: background 500-700ms, hero 650-900ms, toolbar 520-720ms, cards 560-760ms with 80-140ms stagger, blur/translate/opacity reveal, cubic-bezier smooth or soft spring easing, reduced-motion fallback.
